$comment: Settings injected into VS Code when running e2e tests via vscode-extension-tester. Passed to `extest run-tests --code_settings`. Keep this minimal; see scripts/run-e2e.sh for wiring. Blocks the VS Code 1.116+ 'Welcome to VS Code / sign in to continue with AI-powered development' onboarding overlay (CSS class .onboarding-a-overlay) that otherwise intercepts activity-bar clicks and fails the tests.
